hero.name: Material
hero.tagline: The design shelf — fonts, icons, UI kits, and objects we reach for
hero.description: A small curated shelf from the StoicSoft design team. Everything here is tested in real product work and either bought, licensed, or kept bookmarked.

items.name: Fraunces
items.description: The serif we use across StoicSoft’s editorial surfaces — Field & Form magazine, the Builders directory, the essay blog template.

items.name: Inter
items.description: Our default UI sans across every product surface. Variable, well-hinted, opinionated in a good way.

items.name: Lucide
items.description: A community fork we use across ServerCompass and 1DevTool. Reviewed every release, snapped to our 24px grid.

items.name: Geist Mono
items.description: The monospace pairing on our engineering blog template. Crisp, tight, readable at small sizes.

items.name: StoicSoft palette
items.description: The tokens every StoicSoft product references — teal accents, cream papers, pragmatic grays. Open-sourced for remix.

items.name: Field UI kit
items.description: A magazine-leaning component library paired with our blog-magazine template. 84 components, auto-layout everywhere.

items.name: Porto Field Stock
items.description: Our open stock library of Lisbon, Porto, and Évora — used in StoicSoft marketing surfaces. CC-BY 4.0.

items.name: Field Notebook
items.description: A 192-page dot-grid notebook from our bindery in Porto. The physical object we pair with every template we ship.

items.name: JetBrains Mono
items.description: Our second monospace choice, used inside the IDE-like surfaces of 1DevTool and ServerCompass terminals.

items.name: Midori A5 sketchbook
items.tagline: The sketchbook on our designer’s desk
items.description: Cream paper, perfect for pencil and felt-tip. What Clara Figueira uses for all early-stage sketches at the StoicSoft studio.

items.name: Grid Systems · Josef Müller-Brockmann
items.tagline: The grid reference we keep at the desk
items.description: A cornerstone design reference. Read twice, referenced often at the StoicSoft studio. Worth the shelf space.

items.name: Radix Colors
items.description: The color scales we reach for when starting a new product. Carefully-tuned contrast, dark mode built-in.
